title: All 16 workflows — master patient journey
caption: Complete flow from first paid touch to long-term retention. WF-05 (purple) is the keystone: it's the only place appointment outcomes land on the Opportunity. Every sold deal flows right; every failure flows to the retention pool. Dotted = signal/support workflows.
src:
flowchart TD
    PAID([Paid and Organic Traffic]) --> WF01
    MISS([Missed Call or Chat]) --> WF16
    WF16[16 - Comms Edge] --> WF01
    WF01[01 - Lead Capture and Attribution] -->|Books| WF03
    WF01 -->|No book after 24h| WF02
    WF02[02 - Non-Booked Recovery]
    WF03[03 - Booking Confirmation and Reminders] --> WF04
    WF04[04 - Medical Intake Chase]
    WF03 -->|Appointment day| VISIT{Visit}
    VISIT -->|No-Show or Cancel| WF08
    VISIT -->|Showed| WF05
    WF08[08 - No-Show and Cancel Recovery]
    WF05[05 - Clinic Outcome Router] -->|Sold| WF06
    WF05 -->|Advised and Declined| WF07
    WF05 -->|Medically Untreatable| WF11
    WF06[06 - Post-Visit Won and Onboarding]
    WF07[07 - No-Sale Nurture]
    WF11[11 - Compliance and Errors]
    WF06 --> WF10[10 - Feedback Survey]
    WF06 --> WF14[14 - Ambassador Program]
    WF14 --> WF15[15 - PCC Referral Routing]
    WF15 --> WF01
    WF06 --> WF09[09 - Long-Term Nurture]
    WF07 --> WF09
    WF08 --> WF09
    WF02 -->|16 days no booking| WF09
    WF12[12 - Call Disposition Handler] -.-> WF05
    WF13[13 - Ad Platform Conversions] -.-> ADS[(Google and Meta)]
    style WF05 fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style WF06 fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style VISIT fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style WF09 fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style WF02 fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style WF08 fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff

title: WF-01 — Lead Capture and Attribution
caption: Fires on every form submit (5 location webhooks + consultation form). The fix here is capturing gclid and fbclid at the moment of lead creation — before any page navigation clobbers the URL params. Creates the Opportunity in 'New Lead' stage immediately.
src:
flowchart TD
    T([Form Submitted - Inbound Webhook]) --> A
    A[Capture gclid - fbclid - UTM params
Write to contact custom fields] --> B
    B[Set contact.lead_source
and contact.lead_source_detail] --> C
    C[Create Opportunity
Sales Pipeline - New Lead stage] --> D
    C --> E
    D[SMS - Speed to Lead
Instant - first touch] --> F
    E[Email - Welcome
Instant] --> F
    F[Staff Alert - Internal Notification
plus 2 minutes] --> CALL
    CALL[Phone Call - Speed to Lead
plus 5 minutes] --> G
    G{Appointment booked
within 24 hours?}
    G -->|Yes| OK
    G -->|No| NG
    OK([Exit to WF-03 Booking Confirmation])
    NG([Exit to WF-02 Non-Booked Recovery])
    style T fill:#1e40af,color:#fff
    style OK fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style NG fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style C fill:#0f766e,color:#fff
    style CALL fill:#b45309,color:#fff

title: WF-02 — Non-Booked Recovery (10-touch sequence)
caption: Fires when a lead hasn't booked within 24 hours. Runs 5 SMS + 4 email + 1 voicemail over 16 days. Exits immediately if the contact books at any point (goes to WF-03). After 16 days with no booking, hands off to WF-09 long-term nurture.
src:
flowchart TD
    T([No booking 24h after lead
Enters Non-Booked Recovery]) --> CALL
    CALL[Phone Call - Speed to Lead
plus 5 minutes from no-book] --> S1
    S1[SMS 1 - Follow-Up
plus 2 hours] --> E1
    E1[Email 1 - Health Education
plus 4 hours] --> S2
    S2[SMS 2 - Symptom Re-Engagement
plus 1 day] --> E2
    E2[Email 2 - Physician-Led Process
plus 2 days] --> V1
    V1[Voicemail Drop
plus 3 days] --> S3
    S3[SMS 3 - Availability
plus 5 days] --> E3
    E3[Email 3 - Return-to-Self Testimonial
plus 7 days] --> S4
    S4[SMS 4 - Symptom Re-Engagement
plus 10 days] --> E4
    E4[Email 4 - Urgency
plus 14 days] --> S5
    S5[SMS 5 - Empathetic Breakup
plus 16 days] --> EXIT
    EXIT([Exit to WF-09 Long-Term Nurture])
    T -.-> BOOK([Exit at any point if books
to WF-03 Booking Confirmation])
    style T fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style CALL fill:#b45309,color:#fff
    style EXIT fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style BOOK fill:#166534,color:#fff

title: WF-03 + WF-04 + WF-05msg — Pre-Appointment Sequence
caption: From booking confirmation through to appointment day. Three logical phases: instant confirmation (WF-03), intake form chase (WF-04), and appointment reminders (WF-05 message workflow). A patient who completes intake skips the chase steps.
src:
flowchart TD
    START([Appointment Booked]) --> C1
    C1[SMS - Booking Confirmation
Instant] --> N1
    START --> E1
    E1[Email - Booking Confirmation
Instant] --> N1
    N1[Staff Notification
Instant] --> I1
    I1[SMS - Intake Form Reminder
plus 1 hour] --> GATE
    GATE{Intake form
completed?}
    GATE -->|Yes| REM
    GATE -->|No| IC1
    IC1[SMS - Intake Chase 1
plus 4 hours] --> IE1
    IE1[Email - Confirmation Chase
plus 12 hours] --> IC2
    IC2[SMS - Urgency Chase 2
plus 24 hours] --> IV1
    IV1[Voicemail Drop
plus 36 hours] --> REM
    REM([Reminders begin]) --> R1
    R1[Email - 3-Day Prep Email
3 days before appointment] --> R2
    R2[SMS - 1-Day Reminder
1 day before appointment] --> R3
    R3[Email - 1-Day Prep Email
1 day before appointment] --> R4
    R4[SMS - Morning-Of
8 AM day of appointment] --> R5
    R5[SMS - 2-Hour Intake Prompt
2 hours before appointment] --> APPT
    APPT([Appointment Day
WF-05 Clinic Outcome Router fires])
    style START fill:#1e40af,color:#fff
    style APPT fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style GATE fill:#0f766e,color:#fff

title: WF-05 — Clinic Outcome Router (THE KEYSTONE)
caption: The most critical workflow in the rebuild. Currently WF-05 auto-creates a Won opportunity for every attendee — producing 939 false wins. After rebuild: no automation moves the Opportunity. Only the PCC Sales Form does, by recording outcome + value directly on the Opportunity. This is what fixes revenue recognition.
src:
flowchart TD
    T([Appointment window closes
Clinic Outcome Router trigger fires]) --> Q1
    Q1{Did patient show up?}
    Q1 -->|No-Show or Cancel| NS
    NS[Move Opp to No-Show stage
Tag: no-show
Opportunity stays Open] --> EXIT_NS
    EXIT_NS([Exit to WF-08 No-Show Recovery])
    Q1 -->|Showed| PCC
    PCC[PCC opens Opportunity
Completes the Sales Form] --> Q2
    Q2{Sale Outcome selected}
    Q2 -->|Sold| SOLD
    SOLD[Move Opp to Won
Set Value = Total Program Amount
Copy lead source + gclid to Opp
Tag: sold] --> CAPI
    CAPI[Fire Ad Conversion - WF-13
Booked + Won events to Google and Meta] --> EXIT_SOLD
    EXIT_SOLD([Exit to WF-06 Post-Visit Won and Onboarding])
    Q2 -->|Advised and Declined| AD
    AD[Move Opp to Lost
Record A and D Reason on Opp
Tag: ad] --> EXIT_AD
    EXIT_AD([Exit to WF-07 No-Sale Nurture])
    Q2 -->|Medically Untreatable| MUT
    MUT[Move Opp to Lost - MUT
Tag: mut
Suppress future automation] --> EXIT_MUT
    EXIT_MUT([Exit to WF-11 Compliance])
    Q2 -->|Medical Approval Required| MAR
    MAR[Opp stays Open
Tag: mar
Awaiting provider approval
No automation fires]
    style T fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style PCC fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style Q2 fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style SOLD fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style EXIT_SOLD fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style AD fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style MUT fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style MAR fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff

title: WF-06 — Post-Visit Won: Onboarding and Review
caption: Fires when the Opportunity is moved to Won. Runs onboarding, a progress check-in, and an NPS survey at 14 days. NPS >= 8 triggers a Google review request + referral activation. NPS < 7 fires an internal alert to call disposition. Eventually hands off to the Ambassador program and Retention pipeline.
src:
flowchart TD
    T([Opportunity Won - Outcome Sold]) --> S1
    S1[SMS - Welcome
plus 1 hour] --> E1
    E1[Email - Welcome and Onboarding
plus 1 hour] --> S2
    S2[SMS - Check-In
plus 3 days] --> E2
    E2[Email - Week 1 Progress
plus 7 days] --> SURVEY
    SURVEY[SMS Survey and Email Survey
plus 14 days] --> NPS
    NPS{NPS Score}
    NPS -->|8 or above| S4
    S4[SMS - Google Review Request
plus 14 days - conditional] --> S5
    S5[SMS - Referral Activation
plus 21 days] --> EXIT1
    EXIT1([Exit to WF-14 Ambassador Program])
    S5 --> EXIT2([Exit to Retention Pipeline
WF-09 Renewal Reminders])
    NPS -->|Below 7| N1
    N1[Internal Alert - Negative NPS
WF-12 Call Disposition notified] --> CALL
    CALL([PCC follows up manually])
    style T fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style EXIT1 fill:#1e40af,color:#fff
    style EXIT2 fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style NPS fill:#0f766e,color:#fff

title: WF-07 No-Sale Nurture + WF-08 No-Show Recovery
caption: Two parallel recovery paths from a failed visit. No-Sale (A&D) runs an 11-touch objection-handling sequence over 35 days targeting the specific reason the patient declined. No-Show runs an 8-touch urgent re-booking sequence over 7 days. Both exit to WF-09 long-term nurture if no re-engagement.
src:
flowchart LR
    subgraph WF07 ["07 - No-Sale Recovery (A&D) - 35 days"]
        T1([Outcome: Advised and Declined]) --> S11
        S11[SMS 1 - No-Pressure
plus 2 hours] --> E11
        E11[Email - Objection Handling x4
plus 1 day] --> S12
        S12[SMS 2 - Labs on File
plus 3 days] --> E15
        E15[Email - Testimonial
plus 7 days] --> S13
        S13[SMS 3 - Encouragement
plus 14 days] --> E16
        E16[Email - Labs Expiring
plus 21 days] --> S14
        S14[SMS 4 - Final Reminder
plus 30 days] --> S15
        S15[SMS 5 - Empathetic Breakup
plus 35 days] --> OUT1
        OUT1([Exit to WF-09 Long-Term Nurture])
    end
    subgraph WF08 ["08 - No-Show Recovery - 7 days"]
        T2([No-Show or Cancel flagged]) --> S21
        S21[SMS 1 - Recovery
plus 15 minutes] --> E21
        E21[Email - Physician Recovery
plus 1 hour] --> S22
        S22[SMS 2 - Availability
plus 1 day] --> E22
        E22[Email - Benefits Pivot
plus 3 days] --> S23
        S23[SMS 3 - Re-Engagement
plus 3 days] --> S24
        S24[SMS 4 - Scarcity
plus 5 days] --> V21
        V21[Voicemail Drop
plus 7 days] --> S25
        S25[SMS 5 - Empathetic Breakup
plus 7 days] --> GATE2
        GATE2{Re-booked?}
        GATE2 -->|Yes| OK2([Exit to WF-03])
        GATE2 -->|No| NG2([Exit to WF-09])
    end
    style T1 fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style T2 fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style OUT1 fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style NG2 fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style OK2 fill:#166534,color:#fff

title: WF-09 Retention + Renewals — WF-10 Long-Term Nurture
caption: WF-09 fires when a patient's program term approaches expiry — runs 5 SMS + 3 email over 30 days. If they don't renew, an internal churn alert fires and they enter long-term nurture. WF-10 runs a 7-touch educational sequence over 120 days for contacts who declined or lapsed — the slow re-engagement path.
src:
flowchart TD
    subgraph WF09 [09 - Retention and Renewal]
        RT([Program approaching renewal date]) --> RE1
        RE1[Email - 30-Day Notice
30 days before renewal] --> RS1
        RS1[SMS - 21-Day Reminder
21 days before renewal] --> RE2
        RE2[Email - 14-Day Nudge
14 days before renewal] --> RS2
        RS2[SMS - 7-Day Urgency
7 days before renewal] --> RS3
        RS3[SMS - Expiry Day
day of renewal] --> RGATE
        RGATE{Renewed?}
        RGATE -->|Yes| RWIN
        RWIN([Renewed - New Opportunity opened
Retention Pipeline])
        RGATE -->|No| RE3
        RE3[Email - Lapsed Member
plus 3 days] --> RS4
        RS4[SMS - Final
plus 7 days] --> RN1
        RN1[Internal Alert - Churn Risk
plus 7 days] --> ROUT
        ROUT([Exit to WF-10 Long-Term Nurture])
    end
    subgraph WF10 [10 - Long-Term Nurture - 120 days]
        NT([Enters Long-Term Nurture
no-sale - no-show - lapsed]) --> NE1
        NE1[Email - Energy as Medical Issue
plus 30 days] --> NS1
        NS1[SMS - CTA
plus 45 days] --> NE2
        NE2[Email - Sleep and Performance
plus 60 days] --> NS2
        NS2[SMS - Seasonal Scarcity
plus 75 days] --> NE3
        NE3[Email - Medical Authority
plus 90 days] --> NS3
        NS3[SMS - Return to Self
plus 105 days] --> NE4
        NE4[Email - Re-Engage Breakup
plus 120 days]
    end
    ROUT --> NT
    style RT fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style RWIN fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style NT fill:#374151,color:#fff

title: WF-11/12/13/14/15/16 — Support and Infrastructure Workflows
caption: Six support workflows that run parallel to the main journey. Compliance is the DND authority — all messaging must check it first. Ad Conversions fires CAPI events on Booked and Won outcomes only. Comms Edge catches missed calls and OOO chat. Ambassador and Referral Routing feed new leads back into WF-01.
src:
flowchart TD
    subgraph WF11 [11 - Compliance and Errors - DND Authority]
        DNC([DNC Contact flagged]) --> STOP1
        STOP1[Set DND flag on Contact
Halt all automation]
        BOUNCE([Email Bounce flagged]) --> STOP2
        STOP2[Remove from email sends
Log to audit trail]
        MUTC([MUT outcome]) --> STOP3
        STOP3[Suppress all future
automation for contact]
    end
    subgraph WF13 [13 - Ad Platform Conversions - CAPI]
        BOOK_EV([Appointment Booked]) --> CAPI1
        CAPI1[Fire Booked Conversion
Google Ads and Meta CAPI]
        WON_EV([Opportunity Won]) --> CAPI2
        CAPI2[Fire Won Conversion
Google Ads and Meta CAPI]
    end
    subgraph WF16 [16 - Comms Edge]
        MISSED([Missed Call]) --> TXT1
        TXT1[SMS - Instant Text-Back
0 minutes] --> TXT2
        TXT2[SMS - Follow-Up
plus 30 minutes]
        CHAT([Chat OOO]) --> BOT
        BOT[Auto-Response
Schedule link]
    end
    subgraph WF14WF15 [14 and 15 - Ambassador and PCC Referral Routing]
        AMB([Post-sale patient activated]) --> REF1
        REF1[Ambassador outreach sequence
Gift + referral link] --> WF15_IN
        WF15_IN[PCC Referral submitted] --> NEW_LEAD
        NEW_LEAD([New lead created
Routes back to WF-01])
    end
    WF16 -.-> WF01_OUT([WF-01 Lead Capture])
    WF14WF15 -.-> WF01_OUT
    style STOP1 fill:#7f1d1d,color:#fff
    style STOP2 fill:#7f1d1d,color:#fff
    style STOP3 fill:#7f1d1d,color:#fff
    style CAPI1 fill:#1e40af,color:#fff
    style CAPI2 fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style NEW_LEAD fill:#166534,color:#fff
